case_title: LEONARDO TORRES REYES VS. ALEJANDRO RODRIGUEZ MENDOZA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,568.00 FILED BY TORRES REYES, LEONARDO AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MENDOZA, ALEJANDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2015 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $119.44 ACCRUED INTEREST, $128.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MENDOZA, ALEJANDRO
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORRES REYES, LEONARDO AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MENDOZA, ALEJANDRO
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON 04/05/2017. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MENDOZA, ALEJANDRO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-01-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MENDOZA, ALEJANDRO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORRES REYES, LEONARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MENDOZA, ALEJANDRO $3,568.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,633.00, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED LOANS TO DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT THE LOANS WERE PAYROLL ADVANCED WITH PAYCHECK DEDUCTIONS. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $250.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON SEP-15-2015 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MENDOZA, ALEJANDRO HEARING SET FOR DEC-14-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ALEJANDRO RODRIGUEZ MENDOZA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS DENIED BECAUEE [X] THE REQUEST DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE POSTPONEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ELLEN ROSENTHAL. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: SEP-09-2015 - FEE FOR SERVICE $68.00 - AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MENDOZA, ALEJANDRO
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MENDOZA, ALEJANDRO
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 12/17/15 AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MENDOZA, ALEJANDRO
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY TORRES REYES, LEONARDO RODRIGUEZ MENDOZA, ALEJANDRO
